_comment: Maps TypeScript submodule SHA to npm package version. Used by conformance testing to match TSC version to submodule commit.
_usage: When you update the TypeScript submodule, find the commit date and use the corresponding nightly: npm view typescript@6.0.0-dev.YYYYMMDD

cdc205d5e6338d96b0fb54657af33d473d480a9c.note: Previous pinned TypeScript commit, retained for history.

35ff23d4b0cc715691323ebe54f523c16fe6e3a5.note: TypeScript release-6.0 RC commit. package.json reports 6.0.1-rc even though the git tag is v6.0-rc.

default.note: Fallback to latest stable when submodule SHA is not mapped
